name: @prismical/audio-capture
description: Dedicated macOS native audio capture binary for Prismical meetings

scripts.build: swift build --configuration release && mkdir -p bin && cp .build/release/prismical-audio-capture bin/prismical-audio-capture
scripts.dev: swift build --configuration debug && mkdir -p bin && cp .build/debug/prismical-audio-capture bin/prismical-audio-capture
